stemHtml: The correct definition of low drifting sand is…

options.a: It is a particular type of sandstorm, usually originating from Egypt.
options.b: Sand that is lifted by the wind to less than 2 m above the ground level.
options.c: Sand that is lifted by the wind to more than 2 m above the ground level.
options.d: This qualifies the low-level gusts of sand when in the vicinity of a sandstorm.
